name: plateau
description: Bounded, predictable context for long Claude Code sessions — carry a small, re-grounded signal across steps instead of replaying the whole transcript.

plugins.name: plateau
plugins.description: Carry a small, re-grounded signal across steps instead of letting the transcript climb toward the context ceiling. SessionStart loads the parent-agent delegation discipline as standing context (active while the plugin is enabled); UserPromptSubmit injects the bounded signal as context; Stop gates newly proposed facts (a fact enters the signal only if a Measurement re-verifies against the repo). Commands: /plateau:status, /plateau:gate. Requires the `plateau` core package: pip install git+https://github.com/aimerdoux/plateau.git
